name: ADO Epic Budget Table
description: Purpose-built budget planning table for PMO Epics. Track spend by Fiscal Year and Cost Category across Q1–Q4. Auto-computes Total Planned Spend, Budget Remaining, and % of Budget, and written back to queryable Epic fields.

contributions.description: Financial budget planning table for Azure DevOps Epic work items. Enter quarterly spend by Fiscal Year and Cost Category. Computes and writes KPIs back to queryable Epic fields.

inputs.name: JSON Storage Field
inputs.description: Multiline text field (Plain Text) that stores budget rows as JSON. Create a field named 'Financials Table JSON' with reference name Custom.FinancialsTableJson on your Epic.

inputs.name: Approved Budget Field
inputs.description: Decimal field to READ the approved budget from (e.g. Custom.ApprovedBudget or your existing Estimated Cost field). Used to compute Budget Remaining and % of Budget. Leave blank to skip.

inputs.name: Total Planned Spend Field
inputs.description: Decimal field to WRITE the computed total planned spend into (e.g. Custom.TotalPlannedSpend). Must exist on the Epic before configuring. Leave blank to skip writeback.

inputs.name: Budget Remaining Field
inputs.description: Decimal field to WRITE the computed remaining budget into (e.g. Custom.BudgetRemaining). Leave blank to skip writeback.

inputs.name: Percent of Budget Field
inputs.description: Decimal field to WRITE the computed % of budget used (e.g. Custom.PercentOfBudget). Leave blank to skip writeback.
